# desec_token_policy (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a specific deSEC token scoping policy.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a specific token policy by token UUID and policy UUID
data "desec_token_policy" "existing" {
  token_id = "3a6b94b5-d20e-40bd-a7cc-521f5c79fab3"
  id       = "7aed3f71-bc81-4f7e-90ae-8f0df0d1c211"
}

output "policy_perm_write" {
  value = data.desec_token_policy.existing.perm_write
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The UUID of the policy to look up.
- `token_id` (String) The UUID of the token this policy belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `domain` (String) Domain name this policy applies to, or `null` for the default policy.
- `perm_write` (Boolean) Whether this policy grants write permission.
- `subname` (String) Subname this policy applies to, or `null` for a wildcard match.
- `type` (String) DNS record type this policy applies to, or `null` for a wildcard match.
